data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no direct evidence that it is implemented or functioning as required, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome.
